subject: fix(pwa): restore installPWA return value, cleanup per CLAUDE.md audit
body:
CLAUDE.md compliance review found 4 issues:

1. BUG: installPWA() changed return value from "prompt shown" to
   "user accepted". Header.jsx checks the return to decide whether
   to show manual install instructions — returning false on dismiss
   incorrectly opened the modal. Restored to return true when
   prompt is shown (regardless of user choice).

2. PROHIBITION: Silent .catch(() => {}) in storeCurrentBuildTime()
   lacked explanation. Added comment documenting why it's intentional
   (fire-and-forget, non-critical, page about to reload).

3. DEAD CODE: offlineGoogleAnalytics: false in vite.config.js was a
   no-op default value creating confusion. Removed.

4. DOC: Added pwaConstants.js to CLAUDE.md Key Components listing.

Tags: pwa, cleanup, compliance
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-hardening
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_016hJj32ZoXvcDL5fCjPCDmD
title: restore installPWA return value, cleanup per CLAUDE.md audit
